english translation text: Ay Ali ke pisarO son of Ali (a.s.)English Transliteration
O son of Ali (a.s), O love of Fatema (a.s),

urdu transliteration text:
Lab pe jiske nabi chumte the kabhiZehr ab us labo ne piya hai abhiKhoon me hai kafan, dekhti hai behen
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The lips of the one which Prophet used to kiss, there is now poison on those lips,
The shroud is covered in blood, and his sister is watching

When Imam Hussain (a.s.) reached the body of Qasim, he saw the pieces of the body,
He faced Medina and said

urdu transliteration text:
Marhala aap par kitna tha who kathanaapa shehr tha aapka tha watanrozae nana par ho na paae dafan
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
It was such a difficult time for Imam Hasan (a.s.), he was in his own city and his own community,
even then you were not allowed to be buried near Prophet (s.a)
